Comment: Polls an S3 Batch Operations job to completion via s3control:describeJob in a Wait+Task+Choice loop, consuming the JobId produced by run_batch_replication ($.BatchJob.JobId). Native SDK only (no Lambda, REPL-06). The describeJob Task assumes the source role imperatively via Credentials.RoleArn.$ and passes AccountId explicitly. The Choice evaluates Job.Status: Complete -> Succeed, Failed/Cancelled -> Fail, any non-terminal state -> loop back to Wait (covers New/Preparing/Suspended/Ready/Active/Pausing/Paused/Cancelling/Failing).

WaitForJob.Comment: Polling interval (D-11 discretion). Waits before each describeJob poll.

DescribeBatchJob.Comment: Describe the batch job in the source account. AccountId passed explicitly; source role assumed imperatively. JobId comes from run_batch_replication output ($.BatchJob.JobId).

EvaluateJobStatus.Comment: Route on Job.Status enum. Terminal states: Complete (success), Failed/Cancelled (failure). All other states are non-terminal and loop back to WaitForJob.

BatchSucceeded.Comment: Normalize the success output, surfacing the job progress summary when present.

BatchJobFailed.Cause: The S3 Batch Replication job reached a terminal failure state (Failed or Cancelled) or describeJob errored. See $.JobStatus.Job.Status / $.Error for details.
